flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Black Hills State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Black Hills State University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (61.4% → 71.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Black Hills State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (26.3% → 29.4%).
